set.body:
## Phase 6 — Missing v1 surface + build/infra

- M1. Standalone triangular solve API + kernel (PRD dense-v1 requirement; absent).
- M2. Sparse canonicalization surface on matrices (canonicalize/pruneZeros/prune/
  sortedIndices/hasCanonicalFormat), not just builder — PRD.md:417-425.
- M3. Banded format; CSC op parity (+,-,mapValues,zipValues,toDense,diagonal,trace);
  decide sparse-sparse multiply (implement CSR×CSR or defer explicitly in PRD).
- M4. Unify COO-sums vs CSR-first-match duplicate lookup semantics —
  Sparse.scala:38-44,236-240.
- M5. Extract gale-laws as reusable cross-built testkit module (backend conformance
  depends on it) — build.sbt:24-34.
- M6. Wasm linker profile + fullLinkJS tasks; CI matrix (LTS + Scala Next) —
  PRD.md:1234-1243.
- M7. vendor/breeze: exclude from packaging or relocate out of repo.
- M8. Scaladoc for public surface: NaN policy, view-vs-copy semantics, positive-stride
  restriction, Cholesky reads-lower-triangle-only.
set.title: Remediation P6: missing v1 surface + build infra — triangular solve, canonicalization, Banded, gale-laws, Wasm/CI
